hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+|refs/tags' && exit 0; LATEST=$(git ls-remote --tags origin | grep -oE 'v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' | sort -V | tail -1); if [ -z "$LATEST" ]; then NEXT="v0.0.1"; else VER="${LATEST#v}"; M1="${VER%%.*}"; REST="${VER#*.}"; M2="${REST%%.*}"; M3="${REST#*.}"; NEXT="v${M1}.${M2}.$((M3 + 1))"; fi; git tag "$NEXT" && git push origin "$NEXT" && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Tag $NEXT creado y publicado\"}" 2>/dev/null || true
